why.title:
One intentional
<1>date every Wednesday
why.desc: Tired of endless swiping and dead-end 'Hi's? We send you one quality match every Wednesday. No games, just real university students.
why.noSwipingDesc: Our algorithm handles everything for you.
why.campusSafeDesc: Exclusive to students with verified .edu.hk emails.
why.personalizedDesc: We match based on values, vibe, and availability.

curated.title:
Dates that
actually
happen.
curated.desc: We don’t just give you a profile; we suggest a safe, campus-vibe spot and an easy conversation opener.

step1.title: Tell us your vibe
step1.desc: Complete your profile before Tuesday night.
step1.example: E.g. 'I love night views at TST'
step1.detailQuote: "Your profile is your digital vibe. We don’t just want your major; we want to know what makes you tick." ✨
step1.vibeTagsDesc: Cloud-chaser, night owl, or library regular
step1.encryptionNote: Your data is encrypted and only shared with your match.

step2.title: Wednesday Drop
step2.detailQuote: "Every Wednesday at 7 PM, the magic happens. No choices, just the one." ✉️
step2.userQuote: "I opened my phone at 7:01 and saw a guy from my college. It felt serendipitous." — CUHK Year 3

step3.title: Share your availability
step3.detailQuote: "We find your overlapping schedule automatically so you don't have to." ☕
step3.check1: Choose from curated campus safe spots.

step4.title: Go on the date
step4.desc: Give feedback to improve next time.
step4.example: E.g. 'Great vibe, let's do it again!'
step4.detailQuote: "Meeting in the real world is where the spark happens." 🌟
step4.userQuote: "Your feedback improves matching for everyone. Your next drop will be better because of it."

home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Wednesday drops

faqs.a: Our algorithm looks at more than just photos. It analyzes interests, values, and even your weekly schedule to ensure you meet someone you’ll actually enjoy talking to on campus.
Yes. To keep the community safe and relevant, we only support students from verified Hong Kong university institutions.

faqs.q: Why only one match a week?
faqs.a: Infinite lists lead to fatigue. By giving you one intentional match every Wednesday, we help you focus on really getting to know one person.

faqs.q: What if I don't like my match?
faqs.a: You’re always in control. Provide feedback after every match. If you select 'Pass' or 'Rematch', the algorithm learns your taste. Safety and comfort are our priority.
We suggest meeting at public campus spots like HKU's Book Cafe or CUHK's Lake Ad Excellentiam. Keep it low-pressure, public, and around an hour for the first time.

home.footerTitle:
Ready to meet the next
person on campus?

join.title: Join next Wednesday Drop
join.subtitle: Use uni email, verify with dev code, and wait for next Wednesday.

dev.title: Real onboarding flow
dev.subtitle: Use dev mode to skip verification, then experience the same profile and questionnaire APIs a real user will use.
dev.accountDesc: For production-style testing, request a code and verify. For day-to-day UI work, use the dev button on the left.
dev.profileDesc: This is the real profile save step. These values also make your user eligible for matching.
dev.crossCampus: Include cross-campus candidates in my test pool
dev.completeDesc: You have now completed the real profile and questionnaire flow. Use Admin to run matchmaking and drop immediately, then return to Student dashboard.
dev.userCreated: Dev user created and signed in. Continue through the real onboarding flow.
dev.profileSaved: Profile saved. Now answer the real onboarding questions.
dev.sectionSaved: Saved. Continue to the next section.
dev.completeMsg: Onboarding complete. You can now enter the student dashboard or generate a match from Admin.
dev.uploadPhotosHint: Add up to {{count}} clear photos for local testing.

placeholders.bio: e.g. I like coffee, campus walks, thoughtful conversations and low-pressure first dates.

errors.required: Please fill in all required fields to continue.

student.title: Student Dashboard
student.signInPrompt: Please sign in to view your dashboard.

nextDropView.title: You’ve joined the next drop!
nextDropView.desc: Aura believes in quality over quantity. No more swiping. Every Wednesday at 7:00 PM you get one **intentional match**.
nextDropView.verifiedDesc: We ensure every person is a real student from your school.
nextDropView.highSignalDesc: Algorithm focuses on shared interests and values.

basics.title: Basic Information
basics.desc: Let's start with the essentials about you.

prefs.title: Dating Preferences
prefs.desc: Who are you looking for and what are your goals?

attraction.title: Background & Attraction
attraction.desc: What makes you tick, and who catches your eye?

media.title: Media Profile
media.desc: Add photos that help someone understand your face, style, and everyday vibe.

gender.why: Helps us find the right matches for you.

birthday.why: We only show your age to others.

ethnicity.why: Optional preference data to better understand your background.

height.why: Some people have height preferences, we use this for better matching.

grade.why: Helps match you with people in a similar life stage.

targetGender.prompt: Who would you like to date?
targetGender.why: This is a hard preference, not just a ranking signal.

datingGoal.prompt: What are your dating goals right now?
datingGoal.why: This keeps casual, friendship, and serious-intent users from being forced into the same lane.

targetEthnicity.why: Optional preference data; leave broad if you do not care.

matchMode.why: Controls whether we prioritize speed or stricter preference fit.

hobbies.prompt: Share some of your hobbies and interests
hobbies.why: Open-ended answers feed your persona summary.

attractHeight.prompt: Physical traits you tend to notice: height / build
attractHeight.why: Optional specificity helps avoid purely vibe-based matches.

attractFace.prompt: Physical traits you tend to notice: face / expression
attractFace.why: Open text is less brittle than forcing a checklist for subjective attraction.

attractEnergy.prompt: Energy or style you are usually drawn to
attractEnergy.why: Turns vague chemistry preferences into a signal we can compare.

hkMtrLocation.prompt: Which MTR line/area do you most frequently hang out around?
hkMtrLocation.why: Helps algorithm match you locally or plan the date location.

languagePref.prompt: What's your most comfortable language for dating?
languagePref.why: Essential in HK's trilingual environment for a comfortable first date.

hkWeekendVibe.prompt: What's your ideal weekend vibe in HK?

mbtiJ.why: How do you organize your life?

photos.why: Photos make the match feel real and help future UI test the media profile surface.

mediaNotes.prompt: Anything the system should know about these photos?
mediaNotes.why: Optional notes for interpreting your media profile.
mediaNotes.placeholder: e.g. first photo is my usual look; second is from a hiking day

opt.mode_wait: Wait for the one (Must meet all criteria)
opt.mtr_tsuen_wan_kwun_tong: Tsuen Wan / Kwun Tong Line (e.g. PolyU, CityU)
opt.vibe_food: Local food (Cha Chaan Tengs/Dai Pai Dong)
